info.title: Bankai API
info.description: Public HTTP API for querying Bankai chain data and cryptographic proofs.

get.description: List blocks with optional pagination and status filtering. Use the returned cursor to fetch the next page.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor encoded by the API to fetch the next page

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of blocks to return (1-100)

post.description: Generate a Bankai block proof bundle containing block proof and historical Bankai MMR proof.

200.description: Generated block proof + Bankai MMR proof

get.description: Returns the S-two proof of a given bankai block (default: latest completed).

parameters.name: block_number
parameters.description: Bankai block number to fetch the proof for (defaults to latest completed).

parameters.name: proof_format
parameters.description: Returned proof payload format (`bin` by default).

200.description: S-two proof of the requested bankai block

get.description: Return the latest known block and its summary information. Optionally filter by block status.

post.description: Generate a Bankai MMR inclusion proof for a historical target block hash against a resolved reference block.

get.description: Return detailed information for the requested block height, including consensus snapshots and Bankai block summary fields.
Return full witness-derived block data, including beacon, execution, and OP chain snapshots resolved at this block height.
Returns the S-two proof of a given bankai block.

parameters.name: proof_format
parameters.description: Returned proof payload format (`bin` by default).

200.description: S-two proof of the requested bankai block

get.description: Return metadata for all supported chains known to Bankai. Use this to discover network IDs and names before querying other endpoints.
Return metadata for a single chain by its numeric identifier.
Return the explorer-oriented latest state summary for a single chain.
Return the latest beacon height based on the selector filter.

post.description: Generate a light client proof for the beacon chain.
Generate an MMR inclusion proof for a beacon header hash.

get.description: Return beacon MMR roots for the resolved snapshot.
Return the beacon snapshot for the resolved bankai block.
Return the Ethereum epoch for the resolved bankai block.
Return the Ethereum epoch by number (requires completed bankai block).
Return the latest execution height based on the selector filter.

post.description: Generate a light client proof for the execution chain.
Generate an MMR inclusion proof for an execution header hash.

get.description: Return execution MMR roots for the resolved snapshot.
Return the execution snapshot for the resolved bankai block.
Fetch sync committee keys by term id.
Explorer-oriented overview of Bankai status, supported chains, and recent blocks.
Liveness probe to confirm the API is up and responsive.
Return OP chain L1 submission height for the resolved selector finality.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: OP stack chain name (case-insensitive exact match)

422.description: Snapshot does not satisfy requested finality

post.description: Generate a full OP stack light client proof bundle (block proof + merkle proof + MMR proofs).

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: OP stack chain name (case-insensitive exact match)

200.description: Generated OP stack light client proof

post.description: Generate a merkle proof decommitting an OP chain output from op_chains.root.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: OP stack chain name (case-insensitive exact match)

post.description: Generate an OP chain MMR proof and include the merkle decommitment to link it back to op_chains.root.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: OP stack chain name (case-insensitive exact match)

200.description: Generated OP stack MMR proof bundle

get.description: Return the OP stack snapshot for a given chain name at the resolved Bankai block.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: OP stack chain name (case-insensitive exact match)

422.description: Snapshot does not satisfy requested finality

tags.name: OP Stack
tags.description: OP Stack chain snapshots and proofs
